---
description: Intentionally duplicated and vague .NET guidance for CATES practice.
applyTo: "**/*.cs"
---

# Sample .NET Instructions

This repository uses .NET. Use nullable reference types. Put business behavior
in services and test important behavior.

Always provide detailed explanations and return the complete changed file.
Use appropriate error handling and suitable test coverage as needed.

Reference all files under `@src/**` before changing a C# file.
